style: painterly SNES 16-bit pixel art, visible pixel grid, dithered gradients, rich but limited palette, soft internal shading and gentle glow, hand-placed pixel detail, clean readable silhouettes, the look of a 1994 JRPG story cutscene
reference_rule: Create a NEW independent scene. Use reference images only for character identity, proportions, art style and palette. Do not copy their composition or camera.
negative: No text, numbers, logos, badges, flags, depth-of-field blur, thick black outlines, photorealism, 3D rendering, watermarks or human faces unless explicitly requested.
